{{Languages}}{{:Infobox:Artillery shell}}
The '''artillery shell''' is used as ammunition by [[artillery]]. It is a rather slow projectile that is shown on the map and explores every chunk as it travels to its target. It deals enough damage to destroy any [[enemies|enemy]] nest or worm within two shots.

While artillery shells have a stack size of 1, they can stack up to 100 inside the inventory of the [[artillery wagon]] itself and up to 15 inside the [[artillery turret]].
